message:
perf(widgets): add #[inline] to widget state accessors (bd-2qytc)

Add #[inline] to 35 trivial accessor methods across 18 widget files
for cross-crate inlining optimization. Covers is_empty, len, is_visible,
is_open, cursor, focused, width, selected_index, and similar hot-path
state queries.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
